title: Shaded Text Lololowka Resourcepack [M47]
description: This resource pack adds a font and shadow on the text as in the season "Workshop 47" on the channel MrLololowka [Roman Filchenkov].
body:
**## This resource pack adds a font and shadow
on the text as in the season "Workshop 47" on the channel MrLololowka [Roman Filchenkov].**

**It works easily.**
To begin with, you need to add it to the Minecraft itself, and to be more precise, in the Resourcepack folder in the root of the game
Then activate it in the Minecraft settings

And then you can enjoy the beautiful text.
